message:
fix(runtime): add #[must_use] to queue accessors + early drop of storage guard

- Add #[must_use] to capture_queue_depth() and capture_queue_capacity()
  to prevent silent discard of queue metrics
- Explicitly drop storage_guard after extracting write queue stats
  to release the lock before the async block continues, preventing
  unnecessary lock contention

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
